_meta.description: Fallout series quote database for the Twitter bot. Each entry is one daily tweet.
sources: Fallout series games (Interplay/Obsidian/Bethesda) — fair use, non-commercial
_meta.review_status: DRAFT — needs human review before going live

quotes.quote: War. War never changes.
You saved us, but you'll kill us. You're a hero. You have to leave.
So what shall it be? Do you join the Unity? Or do you die here?
Been there. Seen that. Got the scars.
Well, check out this bouquet of assholes.
Your ride's over, mutie. Time to die.
You fight like old people fuck.
God I wish I had a limit break.

For on that fateful day, when fire rained from the sky, the giant steel door of Vault 101 slid closed and never reopened. It was here you were born. It is here you will die. Because in Vault 101: no one ever enters, and no one ever leaves.
Democracy is non-negotiable.
Death is a preferable alternative to communism.
Communism is the very definition of failure.
Embrace democracy, or embrace oblivion!
Obstruction detected. Composition: Communist. Composition: Unacceptable!
Democracy will never be defeated!
Tactical assessment: Red Chinese threat, immediate. U.S. Military response: lethal force, authorized.
Fight the good fight! This is Three Dog, and you're listening to Galaxy News Radio. Awoooo!
Good, good, good. I love it when people do the right thing.

Come on over here. I want to show you something. See that? It was your mother's favorite passage. Revelation 21:6. 'I am Alpha and Omega, the beginning and the end. I will give unto him that is athirst of the fountain of the water of life freely.'
What kind of person are you going to be?
You've made your last delivery, kid. Sorry you got twisted up in this scene. From where you're kneeling, must seem like an 18-karat run of bad luck. Truth is, the game was rigged from the start.
Truth is, the game was rigged from the start.
What in the goddamn...?
Baby, getting outplayed and getting cheated ain't the same thing.
Vegas gotta swing, baby, gotta have pizzazz.
To your untrained eyes, it may look as though mankind is making a comeback. But neither the NCR nor Caesar's Legion offer a future. They're regurgitations of the past.
If you want to see the fate of democracies, look out the windows.
Give me 20 years, and I'll reignite the high technology development sectors. 50 years and I'll have people in orbit. 100 years, and my colony ships will be heading for the stars.
I prefer the term 'autocrat'. I would rule as a chief executive. Nothing to impede progress.
Finally, my Legion will have its Rome.
Patrolling the Mojave almost makes you wish for a nuclear winter.
Life has a way of punishing you for the mistakes you make.
I have been baptized twice, once in water, once in flame.
I survived because the fire inside burned brighter than the fire around me.
We can't expect God to do all the work.
Waging war against good people is bad for the soul. This may not seem important to you now, but it's the most important thing I've said.

There are things you can't fight — acts of God. You see a hurricane coming, you get out of the way. But when you're in a fight with a human being, you have to look in their eyes and let them know you're there.
Who are you, who do not know your history?
If war never changes, then men must change, and so must their symbols.
Thought carrying that Chip would end you. No... you got lives in you, hard to kill. Storms, bullets... sand and wind, yet still you walk.
Finding it, though — that's not the hard part. It's letting go.
All lose in different ways. A dam of corpses, towns of corpses, scattered across the sand. But whose, in what shares? Even the dealer doesn't know.
Near as I can tell, it was some sort of religious institution. Everything in here seems to be related to the worship of some guy back in the day. If that's not worship, I don't know what is.
Where every man is free to follow his own path, do his own thing. Where every man is a king in his own right.
Nipton was a wicked place, debased and corrupt. It served all corners, so long as they paid. It was a town of whores.
The victory here shall be swift. Our forces shall take the dam, secure it, then build a road west on the bodies of the NCR.
Vegas will fall.
I count on no one.
Treachery is a weapon one should never rely on.
There is wisdom in your words, Man of the West.
The NCR's the biggest gang of thieves in the Mojave, only difference is they pass laws to make their crimes legal before they commit them.
I'd like a large Atomic Shake and a double Brahmin burger. And easy on the agave sauce this time.
I know where you live, Ramos. Open up.
Millions... perhaps even billions, died because science outpaced man's restraint.
War. War never changes.
I'm calling it here. This world can officially bite my ass.
In 100 years when I finally die, I hope I go to hell. So I can kill you again.
Even good people do crazy things when they're scared. Ought to be Diamond City's motto.
Hey, chin up. I know the night just got darker, but it won't last forever.
Who do you think actually won the war? No one, I guess.
There really is no way to ride a seesaw with dignity.
More stairs? Who built this damn vault, a fitness instructor?
I told them I was rigged to explode and started going 'Beep, beep, beep.' Hardest part of that rescue was trying not to laugh as they ran over each other trying to get away.
Used to go with a gal from Malden. And to head off the next natural question — no, she wasn't a toaster.
I've seen a lot of things in this city, most of them I wish I hadn't.
No one in power should be comfortable for too long.
Being a ghoul beats the alternative. Trust me.
I've always admired true believers. Even if I don't share the faith.
The past, the present, and the future walked into a bar. It was tense.
I'm so sorry. I do not know what I would have done without you these past 210 years.
Strong hope we find milk of human kindness soon.
Strong not understand. But Strong support.
My job in the Railroad is intel. That job's easier if no one knows I'm in the Railroad.
In the span of a few hours, my identity was ripped from me. The thing I fought for, sacrificed for... all of it stripped away.
I wonder if this is normal for other journalists.
Keep talking and I'll put you on the front page, and not in a good way.
Ten years. That's how long it's been since I actually gave a damn about someone else.
I'm here to pick up an order. Two large pepperoni and a calzone. Name is 'Fuck you.'
You can imagine the look on me parents' faces when I kicked down their door.
Walk a hundred miles if I knew there were a pile of caps at the end.
Everyone wants to save the world, they just… they disagree on how.
There's a lot of money in selling the end of the world.
You come from a world of rules, of laws. This place is indifferent to all of that.
If you only let the bad guys use it, the bad guys win.
Flesh is weak, but steel endures.
New Vegas is more than a city — it's the remedy to mankind's derailment.
I think only Caesar can lead the Legion. No, the Legion dies with Caesar. What follows now are just the last steps of a man who does not yet realize that he's walking dead.

Don't worry. I won't have you lashed to a cross. I want you to witness the fate of the town of Nipton, to memorize every detail. And then? I want you to teach everyone you meet the lesson Caesar's Legion taught here.
Each clutched his ticket, hoping it would set him free. Each did nothing, even when loved ones were dragged away. They stood and hoped their turn would not come. Each cared only for himself.
Four years ago, we held this dam. Four years ago, we carried the weight. Four years ago, we drew a line through the Mojave as clear as the Colorado River — a line that Caesar cannot cross.
Okay, let's get the fuck out of here. What the hell are you waiting for — do you think I want to get shot? Let's go.
I have to admit, it's hard to believe. That even after all he did to me, all he tried to do to erase me from this world — he went first.
What about you? What kind of person are you going to be?
You see, before the war, the world was powered by the atom. Great machines of science harnessed the power of the atom and lit the cities of America. But it wasn't enough.
If I was twenty years younger, I'd go east and explore the Midwest.
Hey, Jet, motherfucker, Jet! Yer talkin' to its maker.
Welcome to the United States of America. Democracy lives.
I am Liberty Prime. I am America. You cannot kill America.
Better dead than red.
Communism is a temporary setback on the road to freedom.
The American Dream is not dead. It is alive, and it is protected by Liberty Prime.
Science has already given us the greatest weapon in the history of warfare — the atomic bomb. It is time to unleash its full potential.
I am the very model of a scientist salutatorian.
They asked me how well I understood theoretical physics. I said I had a theoretical degree in physics. They said welcome aboard.
Yes Man will do exactly what you say! Always! No matter what!
Activating Stealth Boy. I am become Death, the destroyer of worlds... or, well, just you.
Good God, you catch the plates on that one?
If you find any pieces of my legs, could you pick them up for me?
My name is Mister Handy, tidier of things. Look upon this room I said I'd cleaned, and despair.
I'm a good Christian woman, and I will not stand by while you besmirch my good name.
Curie understands medicine but not people. There is much to learn.
Another settlement needs our help. I'll mark it on your map.
Do you think before the war, people were really any different? Or were they always capable of this kind of violence?
Freedom is just another word for nothing left to lose. I guess we're all free now.
I'm just an old man. An old man who knows a few tricks. And how to fix an engine.
You don't have to be ruthless to be strong, and you don't have to be cruel to survive.
The Brotherhood changed me. But it didn't break me. There's a difference.
I don't care about the future. I care about now. And right now, someone needs help.
History. Can't live with it, can't explain the present without it.
I am the master of war. I am Caesar. And nothing — nothing — will stop my march to the Pacific.
